title: Kydian's Yelling Alien Evolution
description: An Alien Evolution Add-on that allows the aliens to shout their canon names on transformation.
body:
KYDIAN'S YELLING ALIEN

This is an add-on for the Alien Evolution add-on for Palladium. It aims to make the transformation event more alive and immersive, as well as give a personality to aliens.

The main feature of this add-on is the name shouting voice lines, which will play on transformation according to the chosen alien.


Disclaimer:

This add-on is 100% humand-made and AI-free. All the code is hand-written, and the voice lines are either voice-acted or taken straight from the show.

This add-on is still in the alpha testing phase. Most voice lines will be improved in the future, so expect frequent updates for it. The purpose of this release is to give feedback ~~a girlish voice line~~ on the current work in order to guide the project to perfection.

Credits:
- Os Zodiac for voicing XLR8 (os-zodiac on YouTube).
- CreeperCraft for financial support. 

Mod Features:

- Alien name yells on every transformation.
- A variety of voice lines for every alien to randomly pick from.
- Voice lines play when joining worlds already as an alien.

Implemented Alien VLs:

- All 11 base Evo aliens.
- Murk Upchuck (OmniExtras).

Future Plans:

- Add compatibility with custom alien add-ons.
- Replace the vanilla sound effect when taking damage as aliens.
- Add transformation animations to the aliens once transformed (not transformation sequences!).

Installation:

After acquiring the .jar file, it goes to the "mods" folder, just like any other mod, not to "addonpacks".

This is my very first MC Java mod. A good effort has been put into this. I hope this receives the support it deserves!
Real money has been spent on this project. Support me on Ko-Fi (one time donation): https://ko-fi.com/kydiandev
